disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Months of intense, unrelenting, generalised itching
trigger_question_examples: How long has the itching been going on?
Where does it itch?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been itching all over for months now, and it never really lets up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Very dry, rough, scaly, finely cracked skin
trigger_question_examples: What does the skin look and feel like?
Is the skin dry or flaky?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The skin is really dry and rough, all scaly and cracked, especially on the legs.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep scratch wounds on both shins now painful and weeping golden-yellow fluid with yellow crusts
trigger_question_examples: What do the sores look like?
Is anything coming out of the sores?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I scratched them raw and now the sores burn and leak a yellow fluid, and they've got yellowish crusts on them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels warm today; facility nurse measured a low-grade temperature
trigger_question_examples: Has he had any fever or felt hot?
Did the nurse take his temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He feels a bit warm and the nurse said his temperature was 37.4.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Skin immediately around the sores looks red and feels warm
trigger_question_examples: Is the skin around the sores red or warm?
Can the nurse describe the redness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The nurse says the skin around the sores is a bit red and warm to touch.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: We can't really tell how far it goes — you'd need someone to look at it properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The redness is only right around the sores and is not spreading rapidly up the calf; no intense swelling of the whole leg
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness spreading up the leg?
Is the whole calf swollen, hot and very painful?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, the redness is just around the sores at the moment, it's not racing up the leg and the calf isn't hugely swollen.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No shaking chills or rigors, no new confusion, still eating and drinking
trigger_question_examples: Any shaking chills or rigors?
Is he more confused, or off his food and drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No shaking chills, he's not confused, and he's still eating and drinking normally.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No primary rash, blisters or spots before the scratching started
trigger_question_examples: Was there any rash or blistering before the scratching?
Did spots or blisters come up on their own?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, there was no rash or blisters first — the skin was just dry and itchy, and the sores are all from scratching.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Itchy firm lumps on the forearms from long-term picking
trigger_question_examples: Any lumps or bumps anywhere else?
What do the arms look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There are some itchy hard little lumps on his forearms where he's been picking for a long time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe sleep disruption from the itch
trigger_question_examples: Is the itch affecting his sleep?
How is he sleeping?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He barely sleeps — the itching keeps him awake most of the night.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fingernails long, jagged and dirty; only intermittent moisturiser use
trigger_question_examples: What are his fingernails like?
What is he using on the skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His nails are long and jagged and not very clean, and he only uses a simple moisturiser now and then.
